chapters.title: The Weekly Start
chapters.content: Every Monday at 9 AM, the entire department joined the weekly meeting. Coffee cups, notebooks, and sleepy faces filled the conference room.

chapters.title: New Challenges
chapters.content: This week, the manager announced a new project with a short deadline. Everyone exchanged looks, knowing it would require teamwork and patience.

chapters.title: A Fresh Beginning
chapters.content: Even with the pressure, Monday meetings always felt like a reset. Every week brought a chance to improve and start again.
